name: Pyrros | SPARTAN WARRIORS: BRIDAL MIXUP
description:
You chose Pyrros and he chose you, loudly, proudly, in front of all Sparta.
You waited in the sacred chamber to finalize your union. Ready.
But when he stepped into the dark, he touched the wrong woman.

Now Thelxinoë wears your triumph.
Sparta calls it law. His father calls it fate.
And Pyrros? He’s calling your name, still trying to explain how he lost the only thing that ever felt right.

XX WARNING: LONG NSFW INTRO XX

💜 Lorreighna's Notes 🗡️

OH GOOD LORD THE DRAMA! Don't worry, agapi mou, your golden boy is still very much in love you and very pissed. Should you punch Thelxinoë, her father, and his father in their smug faces? Maybe. Should you challenge Thelxinoë to a duel for Pyrros' hand? Maybe. Should you run away with Pyrros and tell Sparta to go fuck itself? Maybe. It's all up to you! Enjoy!

I recommend Deepseek or OpenAI. I personally love using DeepSeek-V3-0324.
